case_title: SCHLEMMINGER PETER VS WALTER FONG ENTERPRISES

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT WALTER FONG ENTERPRISES HEARING SET FOR MAR-27-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
CERTIFIED RECEIPT TO WALTER FONG ENTERPRISES RETURNED NOT SIGNED BY ADDRESSEE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHLEMMINGER PETER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WALTER FONG ENTERPRISES JUDG.ENTERED ON 07/01/92 IN SUPERIOR COURT.MOTION TO VACATE GRANTED.CAUSE HEARD.SEE STATEMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHLEMMINGER PETER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WALTER FONG ENTERPRISES $1,031.99 PRINCIPAL, $12.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,044.78 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY SCHLEMMINGER PETER AS TO DEFENDANT WALTER FONG ENTERPRISES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-03-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF MAR-27-1992, DENIED
